arts.ttl: How Brendan Rodgers BEATING Celtic to 2019 transfer target ended up being £11.5m blessing in disguise
arts.sum: Rodgers once pipped Celtic to James Justin - but it worked out well for the Hoops in the end

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers fires back at what people are now saying about his Celtic side with 'honest answer'
arts.sum: Fans and pundits have been discussing the manager’s tactical approach, some of whom feel Celtic should be more adaptable to match conditions rather than simply trying to impose their own attacking will on elite opponents. Speaking in a pre-match media conference, the Celtic boss said: “I don’t feel anything.

arts.ttl: The Celtic connection to Europa League club's stunning banner display on Thursday night
arts.sum: Slavia Prague fan groups clearly put in a lot of effort on Thursday night for their home match against Ajax in the Europa League, celebrating one of their greatest-ever managers at Fortuna Arena. Johnny Madden took charge of the Czech side for 25 years in the early 1900s, winning three league titles and a clutch of cups during a golden age of success and development.

arts.ttl: Liam Scales pinpoints the crucial 'foundation' he is determined to build on at Celtic
arts.sum: Speaking to official Celtic channels, Scales has admitted the Bhoys’ ongoing clean sheet record is a ‘foundation’ he is desperate to build on for as long as possible. With Celtic flying in the Scottish Premiership, the Bhoys broke a 118-year clean sheet record against St Johnstone last weekend after managing to go six matches without conceding on league duty.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers wants Celtic payback for travel-sick fans despite Parkhead being central to qualification plot
arts.sum: Rodgers knows away wins might not be necessary but rewarding big spending punters with better on the road is his goal

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' latest accolade shows the collective 'hunger' he has instilled in his Celtic squad
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has won the Scottish Premiership Manager of the Month award for September after a run of inspired domestic performances. Last weekend, Rodgers marked his favourite moment in Celtic’s victory at St Johnstone as Daizen Maeda’s run back to pinch the ball from their striker in the 86th minute.

arts.ttl: Scottish Premiership star admits Celtic troubles as he shares why Bhoys are on 'different level'
arts.sum: Speaking to The Scotsman, Hibernian summer signing Ekpiteta has admitted he didn’t realise how good Celtic were and has expanded on why the experience was a wake-up call within his expectations of Scottish football. Others seem to have sat up and taken notice of Celtic, with Hibernian defender Marvin Ekpiteta recounting his own difficulties against the reigning champions back in August.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers picks out Ross County danger man who will be motivated to shine vs Celtic
arts.sum: Celtic travel to face Ross County in Dingwall this weekend, and Brendan Rodgers has picked out one man from the home side that the Bhoys need to be wary of on Sunday. Speaking ahead of Celtic’s travel to face Ross County, Rodgers singled out Ross County striker Ronan Hale as a particular threat the Bhoys will need to watch out for on Sunday amid his bright start to life in Scotland.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers delivers remarkable response to Celtic's thrashing by Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Celtic saw a 17-match winning run ended in Germany in midweek as they were brutally demolished by Borussia Dortmund 7-1 at the Westfalenstadion

arts.ttl: 8 Brendan Rodgers Celtic presser headlines as defiant boss responds to Champions League critics
arts.sum: It's great to dream and for critics to look and think what the score is going to be and what it might be, but as a manager and coach when you’re in the professional game, at times against the Champions League finalists you might expect that you might lose. Psychologically, it’s a very difficult place to be when you’re playing a high-level opponent, but that’s where I commend the players.
